description:
Configure the SMTP mail server settings in JFrog Artifactory OSS to enable email notifications using the following parameters:

- Enabled: Yes
- SMTP Server Host: smtp.devteam.example.com
- SMTP Server Port: 587
- From Address: artifactory-notifications@devteam.example.com
- Subject Prefix: [ArtifactoryAlerts]
- Username: artifactory-notifications@devteam.example.com
- Password: SmtpP@ss2024!
- Use SSL/TLS: Enabled

Save the configuration. Login credentials are: admin / password.
